state.text: PREVIEW MODE This review-only link is not counted as customer link activity or receipt confirmation. NOT COUNTED AQH Summit Fire Hood Cleaning SERVICE REPORT AQH Summit Fire Hood Cleaning Austin, TX | Restaurant hood cleaning May 19, 2026 1 area needs your action SERVICE REPORT Property: Cedar & 5th Grill Location: Austin, TX Reviewed: Maria Lopez, manager Reachable work completed. 1 area needs your action. Reachable work was completed. The blocked area is listed separately and is not presented as cleaned. QUICK ACTIONS Next action and PDF copy. Action needed Contact after clearing access PDF copy RESULT Action needed DOCUMENTATION Access record CUSTOMER ACTION Contact after clearing access PDF COPY Record copy CUSTOMER NEXT STEP Move the stored equipment or obstruction away from the access point, then contact the service team so a revisit can be scheduled. MAY 19 SERVICE RESULT Service result. Completed work, customer action, and the PDF copy are kept together for restaurant records. COMPLETED THIS VISIT Completed areas are listed by area. Completed: Hood canopy and filters, Rooftop fan and roof discharge, Grease path and containment. Blocked / no access: Reachable plenum, duct path, and access. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied. NEEDS CUSTOMER ACTION Rear duct access panel was blocked by stored dry goods. Hood, filters, and reachable plenum were cleaned. Manager should clear access before the next service visit. Rear duct access panel was blocked by stored dry goods. Hood, filters, and reachable plenum were cleaned. Manager should clear access before the next service visit. This area is not listed as cleaned until the follow-up condition is cleared. CUSTOMER ACTION Clear access, then schedule revisit Move the stored equipment or obstruction away from the access point, then contact the service team so a revisit can be scheduled. RECORD NOTE Keep the PDF copy with kitchen exhaust files. The PDF copy is for manager, insurance, or documentation requests. It stays separate from corrective or follow-up work. BLOCKED AREA This area was not completed because access was blocked. Completed work and blocked access are separated, so this visit is not mistaken for full-access service. CUSTOMER ACTION Clear the access path and contact the service team so dispatch can schedule a revisit or close the next window cleanly. Area Rear duct access panel Status Not shown as completed Reason Rear duct access panel was blocked by stored dry goods. Hood
